With noun/verb tables for the different cases and tenses links to audio pronunciation and relevant forum discussions free vocabulary trainer So, die Arbeit is of course the German word for work. And the two words line up fairly well. Die Arbeit macht mir Spaß. I enjoy the work. / The work is fun for me. Gute Arbeit. Great work. Ich bin morgen auf Arbeit. I’m at work/at the office tomorrow. Thomas ist arbeitslos. Thomas is unemployed/jobless. Die Arbeit, die innerhalb der Task Forces getan wurde, war also nicht umsonst. So the work that has been done by the task forces has not been lost. Hierin liegt die ganze Schwierigkeit der vor uns liegenden Arbeit. That, in a nutshell, is what is making our task so difficult.
